series_metadata.series_description: Issued to anyone who submits an application to the Ohio EPA. These certificates are issued for the life of the Solid Waste Composting Facility.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain all certificates and applications onsite during the life of the facility. Retain closed composting facility applications off site 1 year or until audited by the Auditor of State and an audit report is released, then destroy., Paper: Recycle
